posts.author: BB789
posts.text: What's the reason behind NIFTY move? — Bonds didn’t move at all though.

posts.author: Ranjit_DailyTrader
posts.text: What's the reason behind NIFTY move? — Reports came that India may reduce taxes on foreign bond investments after RBI recommendations. This improved expectations that foreign investors may bring more money into India and support the rupee

posts.author: niftymonk
posts.text: What's the reason behind NIFTY move? — I thought if Trump and others are meeting in China. We will remain bearish as anything good for China will be bad for India by default. But yeah, markets are supreme.

posts.author: Joe_Maxpayne
posts.text: What's the reason behind NIFTY move? — just another tweet based move on expiry day

posts.author: BB789
posts.text: What's the reason behind NIFTY move? — Sensex expiry. Lot of money to be made by moving markets. Bonds didn’t move at all.

posts.author: Singrauli
posts.text: What's the reason behind NIFTY move? — Another one “Government may allow OMCs to borrow more money from overseas markets in foreign currencies.” Source Within couple of days govt decision making has become hyperactive

posts.author: Sankalp
posts.text: What's the reason behind NIFTY move? — Its buzzing everywhere, the funny part will be on weekend if it’s disclosed as a fake news.
